{{Quote|The power I felt coming through the cave is just ahead.|Kreia|<ref name="KOTORII" />}}
The '''tomb''' of [[Dark Lord of the Sith/Legends|Dark Lord of the Sith]] [[Ludo Kressh]] was constructed by the [[Sith (species)/Legends|Sith]] slaves of the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]] within the [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]] on [[Korriban/Legends|Korriban]].

==History==
===Death of Kressh===
Located within a cave in the upper [[Valley of the Dark Lords/Legends|Valley of the Dark Lords]], the tomb of [[Sith Lord/Legends|Sith Lord]] [[Ludo Kressh]] was prepared for the death of the Sith Lord. Some time after<ref name="KOTORII" /> [[First battle of Korriban|Kressh's death at the hands of Naga Sadow's forces]] during the [[Great Hyperspace War/Legends|Great Hyperspace War]]<ref name="end">[[Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire 5|''Tales of the Jedi – The Fall of the Sith Empire'' 5]]</ref> in [[5000 BBY/Legends|5000 BBY]],<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> the Sith Lord's body was recovered and interred within the heart of the tomb.<ref name="KOTORII" /> Soon afterwards, [[Post–Great Hyperspace War counterinvasion|the Republic utterly ruined]] the [[Sith Empire/Legends|Sith Empire]]<ref name="SWTOR">''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]''</ref> as [[Naga Sadow/Legends|Naga Sadow]] fled to [[Yavin 4/Legends|Yavin 4]]<ref name="end" /> and a [[Sith Empire (Post–Great Hyperspace War)|portion of the Empire]] fled to [[Dromund Kaas/Legends|Dromund Kaas]].<ref name="SWTOR" /> [[Pultimo]], [[Supreme Chancellor/Legends|Supreme Chancellor]] of the Republic, ordered<ref name="TEA" /> the destruction of Korriban and saw to the bombing of the Valley of the Dark Lords; the tomb lay buried under sand and rubble for millennia as the spirits of the Sith seethed under the surface of the ruined world.<ref name="SWTOR" />

===Rediscovery===
{{Quote|The dangers you faced in this tomb were real, but these images of the past served to prepare you for your future. |Kreia to Meetra Surik|<ref name="KOTORII" />}}
[[File:VisionOfDxunInLudoKresshTomb.jpg|thumb|left|180px|[[Meetra Surik]] experiences a [[Force vision/Legends|vision]] of the [[Battle of Dxun]] above the chasm.]]
During the [[First Jedi Purge]] [[3951 BBY|five years after]] the [[Jedi Civil War]], the former [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Meetra Surik]] traveled to Korriban in search of [[Jedi Master/Legends|Jedi Master]] [[Lonna Vash]]. During her quest, she discovered the cavern in which the tomb was located, fighting through nests of [[Shyrack/Legends|shyracks]] and [[hssiss]] in order to enter the crypt via a carved bridge spanning a deep chasm. Guarded by a [[Terentatek/Legends|terentatek]], the tomb emanated [[Dark side of the Force/Legends|dark side energies]] and areas were cursed so as to project illusions into the minds of intruders in order to make them go mad. As Surik explored the caves and the tomb, she noted the dead terantatek which [[Jedi Knight/Legends|Jedi Knight]] [[Revan/Legends|Revan]] had killed on his quest to rescue [[Thalia May]] from the caves. While Revan had been ignorant to the tomb's existence, Surik was able to enter it and discovered several Jedi corpses. Determining that the Jedi had been driven mad and killed each other, Surik guarded herself from the traps and opened herself to [[The Force/Legends|the Force]]. Inside the antechamber she had a memory of [[Darth Malak|Malak]] recruiting her and several other Jedi to join the [[Revanchist]]s in the [[Mandalorian Wars]]; Surik refused to follow him to the dark side, and Malak and the Jedi who joined him, including [[Bastila Shan]], attacked her, but she quickly defeated them. Deeper into the tomb, she was attacked by shyracks before she faced another memory, this time from the [[Battle of Dxun]]. In the vision she met some of the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] soldiers who served her, all of whom told her that they had to cross a minefield to fight the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]]. Surik walked through the minefield herself and defeated the Mandalorians on the other side. She encountered a vision of [[Kreia]] later on with [[Atton Rand]], [[Bao-Dur]] and [[T3-M4]]. Inside the burial chamber, she fought a vision of Darth Revan, and, after exploring Ludo Kressh's sarcophagus, she escaped the tomb, this time more powerful and more aware of how her decisions made her who she was.<ref name="KOTORII" />

==Behind the scenes==
The Tomb of Ludo Kressh first appeared in the video game: [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]. Originally, all the party members were supposed to be present during Surik's vision of Kreia upon which the party members would either either defeat Kreia or attack Surik depending on the player's choices. At the end of the tomb, before Surik faces a vision of Darth Revan, Surik's doppelgänger is also supposed to attack her rather than just fade away. The doppelgänger has no Force powers, but a considerable amount of strength as well as a red [[Double-bladed lightsaber/Legends|double-bladed lightsaber]]. This was all cut from the final game but was restored in a mod called The Sith Lords Restored Content Mod.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
